programmes.show_description: Blood Bath. Mum-of-two Nikki Whitehead is brutally murdered in her own home. Police suspect she may have known her killer. Polygraphs and CCTV footage help reveal the horrific truth. S2, Ep9
Bodies of Evidence. Killers have many ways to dispose of their victim's remains, but these are often no match for investigators. S2, Ep2
Shreds of Evidence. It is the insignificant details that forensic experts use to recreate a crime and catch a killer - fibres from a carpet, a lost eyelash or a clothing fragment. S2, Ep3
The Green Carpet. When 71-year-old Cindy Mudd goes missing, the Kanawha County Sheriff's Office turns to CCTV to retrace her movements. S10, Ep18
The Kansas Pawnshop. When 56-year-old Andy McGuffee turns up murdered in his burnt-out home, the Oklahoma State Bureau of Investigation looks to surveillance footage. S10, Ep19

Teleshopping.
Raw Greed. Two men are found dead, beaten to death in the bar where they work. A local television station receives an anonymous letter about the murders. S8, Ep9
Murderous Attraction. A woman is rushed to hospital following a massive seizure that has caused her heart to stop beating. Her husband admits to poisoning her. S8, Ep10
Fatal Friendship. When a land developer finds his wife missing, the FBI suspects him of the kidnapping but they must keep their options open. S5, Ep13
Death Pact. In 1990, Chicago experienced a string of bank robberies. As the 'Bearded Bandit' became more sophisticated the FBI surmised that it could be a cop. S5, Ep14
Nathan Matthews & Shauna Hoare. When 16-year-old Becky Watts vanished without trace suspicions fell on her step-brother and his partner. Experts analyse police interviews for clues. S3, Ep8
Texas Rangers. Examines the history and modern evolution of the Texas Rangers, who were formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against attacks from natives. S3, Ep11
Unlikely Sources. How baffling crimes have been solved through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles and other seemingly meaningless objects. S3, Ep13
Not Forgotten. A man risks everything to find his sister's killer - can a sympathetic detective with a great theory help him? Plus, a sexual predator is getting away with murder. S6, Ep10
The Lady In The Woods. A family worries when a godmother never arrives for a baptism. Meanwhile a jogger discovers a woman's body off a remote road in Pennsylvania. S1, Ep3
Girl Gone West. While a young man worries about his missing sister, a young woman's body is found in the Arizona desert - and investigators begin the hunt for her identity. S1, Ep5
Her Whispering Bones. In 2005 Pamela Knight vanishes on her son's birthday and, years later, two men find the remains of a woman buried under an abandoned shed. S1, Ep6
The Old-Fashioned Way. In a small town in Florida, a pastor and his wife take in a young woman from their congregation. But when she disappears, things may not be what they seem. S1, Ep2
Arizona Horror Story. Three bodies are discovered in a burned-out home and a fourth family member is missing. Investigators embark on a decades-long manhunt for the killer. S1, Ep1
Behind Closed Doors. A family are discovered murdered in their quiet suburban home. When one victim is found still clinging to life, police launch a desperate search for the killer. S1, Ep3
A Shot In The Dark. After a nine-year-old girl is caught in the crossfire of a gangland feud, a specialist weapons team moves in to arrest her killer. S1, Ep3

programmes.show_name: New: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programmes.show_description: A mother calls on Texas Ranger Jim Holland, desperate for his help to solve the cold case murder of her son Joseph, executed in the East Texas woods. S1, Ep4
The Daytime TV Killer. A man tries to fool a TV show into awarding him money. Three years later, he kills his partner then calmly lays a trail of false leads. Experts uncover the truth. S6, Ep3
From the Ashes. See how arson investigators gather physical evidence and mount undercover and sting operations to crack insurance torchings and arson murders. S2, Ep9
Seeds of Destruction. See how plants help provide oxygen and nutrients, but in a criminal investigation, they can also mark the time and location of a person's death. S2, Ep4
The Skateboarder. After the shooting of 20-year-old Gabriel Perez at a Fargo, North Dakota, restaurant, a trail of surveillance footage unmasks a jealous gunman. S10, Ep20
What Happened To Skylar Neese? Every parent's worst nightmare comes true when a schoolgirl disappears without a trace. But surveillance footage leads cops to a shocking discovery. S1, Ep2

Broken Trust. When several patients in a small ICU facility die, investigators turn to forensics to solve the mystery. S8, Ep11
Price of Murder. A security guard finds an employee dead in the driver's seat of his car. Police suspect that someone was illegally hunting and shot the victim. S8, Ep12
Brutal Abduction. Re-examines the 1996 investigation into the abduction of a 17-year-old boy from a shop near his home, followed by ransom demands for $30,000. S6, Ep3
Radical Agenda. New Jersey state trooper Phillip Lamanco is shot dead on duty. Detectives try to find his killers. Is there a link to a terrorist future plot? S6, Ep4
Justin Barber. When April Barber was murdered at a remote beauty spot, her husband said he tried to stop the killer and even appealed for help on TV. Experts analyse his deception. S3, Ep9
Fateful Crossing. When an officer dies in the line of duty, the fraternity of law enforcement bands together to make sure that justice is brought to those responsible. S5, Ep17
Deadly Influence. Following the FBI investigators, special agents and detectives as they solve some of the toughest cases. S5, Ep18
Without Mercy. Re-examines the investigation into a US bank heist of 1997, in which two armed men opened fire on staff and police officers at close range without mercy. S6, Ep1
Paging Dr. Essa. Yazeed and Rosemarie Essa lead a happy life, but one day Rosemarie slumps over behind the wheel and crashes, apparently from a heart attack. Was foul play involved? S4, Ep8
The Mystery of Steve McNair. NFL superstar Steve McNair is found shot to death in his downtown apartment with a beautiful woman lying dead at his feet. Is everything how it appears? S4, Ep1
A Hollywood Hit. Hollywood stuntman Garrett opens his door only to be confronted by a gunman who fires point blank. He survives, but will whoever tried to kill him strike again? S4, Ep7
Sex, Death and Videotape. When student Michelle Le goes missing, her family rallies the entire community to look for her. While they hold out for a happy ending, police know better. S4, Ep2
Never Too Late. When Florida rookie Detective Donna Velazquez was assigned the case of David Jackson, who'd been missing for years, she surprised everyone with her findings. S4, Ep5
The Cleveland Conundrum. Matthew Podolak is a young man in his prime. When he arrives in the E.R keeled over with abdominal pains, doctors are mystified by his sudden death. S4, Ep13
Miller. Serial killer Donald Miller was jailed for the murder of four victims and two murder attempts. The survivors speak out as Miller's parole date draws near. S4, Ep5
He Saved Her Life, Then Took It. Betty sees a dark side in her nephew, Chance. He explodes in a fit of rage and harms the one person who cares for him most in the world. S9, Ep11
